name: Onions Fried in Deep Fat
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the onions and slice them very thin into rings.
2. Prepare a batter by mixing flour, milk, egg, and salt until smooth.
3. Drain excess oil from the onion rings.
4. Heat cooking fat in a deep fryer or pot to a temperature that browns bread in 60 seconds.
5. Carefully lower the onion rings into the hot fat using a wire basket.
6. Fry until golden brown, then remove with tongs and drain on absorbent paper.
7. Sprinkle with salt and keep warm until ready to serve.
Onions fried in this way will generally stay crisp for several days or can be reheated the same as potato chips.
